_comment: Active model for the AI fix bot. Edited by ai-model-review.yml (monthly self-assessment) via PR. 'provider' must be one of the known providers in .github/scripts/ai_fix.py PROVIDERS (github-models, gemini, openrouter, groq, mistral, deepseek); base_url + the key env var are resolved from there. The bot may only switch to a provider whose API key is configured as a repo secret.
